sourceNotes: Goa 2001 scenario split news items (2001-01 to 2005-12)

newsItems.title: Foreign Tourist Arrivals Surge Along Coastal Belts (2001-01)
newsItems.description: Charter flights from Europe increase, bringing high foreign tourist footfall. Shack owners demand simplified seasonal permits. In Goa, this monthly event shapes key regional debates.

reactionOptions.text: Initiate a special government commission to resolve tourism_growth issues immediately.

risk.badOutcome: Administrative delays stall the commission, drawing minor local criticism.

reactionOptions.text: Demand that the government address tourism_growth concerns and provide public subsidies.

risk.badOutcome: Discussions break down due to partisan standoffs, leading to minor public fatigue.

reactionOptions.text: Propose a joint multi-party round table to build consensus on tourism_growth.

risk.badOutcome: Radical subgroups refuse to cooperate, causing minor delays.

reactionOptions.text: No comment.

newsItems.title: Iron Ore Transport Barge Operators Launch Strike (2001-02)
